node.description: Get chat inputs from the Playground.

code.name: code
code.value:
from lfx.base.data.utils import IMG_FILE_TYPES, TEXT_FILE_TYPES
from lfx.base.io.chat import ChatComponent
from lfx.inputs.inputs import BoolInput
from lfx.io import (
    DropdownInput,
    FileInput,
    MessageTextInput,
    MultilineInput,
    Output,
)
from lfx.schema.message import Message
from lfx.utils.constants import (
    MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_USER,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
)


class ChatInput(ChatComponent):
    display_name = "Chat Input"
    description = "Get chat inputs from the Playground."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/chat-input-and-output"
    icon = "MessagesSquare"
    name = "ChatInput"
    minimized = True

    inputs = [
        MultilineInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Input Text",
            value="",
            info="Message to be passed as input.",
            input_types=[],
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="should_store_message",
            display_name="Store Messages",
            info="Store the message in the history.",
            value=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        DropdownInput(
            name="sender",
            display_name="Sender Type",
            options=[MESSAGE_SENDER_AI, MESSAGE_SENDER_USER],
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
            info="Type of sender.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="sender_name",
            display_name="Sender Name",
            info="Name of the sender.",
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_USER,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="session_id",
            display_name="Session ID",
            info="The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="context_id",
            display_name="Context ID",
            info="The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.",
            value="",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        FileInput(
            name="files",
            display_name="Files",
            file_types=TEXT_FILE_TYPES + IMG_FILE_TYPES,
            info="Files to be sent with the message.",
            advanced=True,
            is_list=True,
            temp_file=True,
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Chat Message", name="message", method="message_response"),
    ]

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        # Ensure files is a list and filter out empty/None values
        files = self.files if self.files else []
        if files and not isinstance(files, list):
            files = [files]
        # Filter out None/empty values
        files = [f for f in files if f is not None and f != ""]

        session_id = self.session_id or self.graph.session_id or ""
        message = await Message.create(
            text=self.input_value,
            sender=self.sender,
            sender_name=self.sender_name,
            session_id=session_id,
            context_id=self.context_id,
            files=files,
        )
        if session_id and isinstance(message, Message) and self.should_store_message:
            stored_message = await self.send_message(
                message,
            )
            self.message.value = stored_message
            message = stored_message

        self.status = message
        return message

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

files.info: Files to be sent with the message.
files.name: files

input_value.info: Message to be passed as input.
input_value.name: input_value
input_value.value: Is it safe for a 72-year-old patient on warfarin 5mg and aspirin 100mg daily?

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

node.description: Step 1: RxNorm MCP tool validates every drug name is real. Step 2: ChromaDB semantic search on KBFILES folder documents. Step 3: GPT-4o LLM analysis. Unknown drugs are blocked before reaching the LLM — prevents hallucination.

code.name: code
code.value:
# ============================================================
# PASTE THIS ENTIRE FILE into LangFlow / lfx Custom Component
# Component name: MedAgent — Agent 1 RAG Reader
# RxNorm MCP tool built-in — validates drugs before LLM call
# KB reads from local KBFILES folder — NOT hardcoded KB_DOCS
# ============================================================
from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import MessageTextInput, Output
from langflow.schema.message import Message

import os, json, glob, httpx
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI, OpenAIEmbeddings
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.output_parsers import StrOutputParser
from langchain_community.vectorstores import Chroma
from langchain_text_splitters import RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter
from langchain.schema import Document


# ── KB folder path ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Set this to your local KBFILES folder path.
# Windows path — use raw string or forward slashes.
# Override by setting the KB_DIR environment variable.
KB_DIR_DEFAULT = r"C:\Users\Yukth\Downloads\KBFILES"

AGENT1_SYS = """You are a clinical pharmacist doing a routine drug interaction check.

Patient: Age {age}y | Conditions: {conditions}
Medications: {drug_a} {dose_a}mg {freq_a}  +  {drug_b} {dose_b}mg {freq_b}
Clinical question: {clinical_question}

RETRIEVED KNOWLEDGE BASE CONTEXT (use ONLY this — do not add outside knowledge):
{context}

Rules:
- Base your answer ONLY on the context above
- If the context does not mention this drug pair, state UNKNOWN severity
- Do NOT invent mechanisms not present in the context

Respond with:
1. SEVERITY: [MAJOR / MODERATE / MINOR / UNKNOWN]
2. SUMMARY: 2 sentences drawn from context
3. CLINICAL ACTION: 2-3 bullet points
4. SOURCE: quote the source tag from context (e.g. BNF 2024)

⚠️ DISCLAIMER: AI-generated. Research only. Not medical advice."""


class MedAgentRAGReader(Component):
    display_name = "MedAgent — Agent 1 RAG Reader"
    description  = (
        "Step 1: RxNorm MCP tool validates every drug name is real. "
        "Step 2: ChromaDB semantic search on KBFILES folder documents. "
        "Step 3: GPT-4o LLM analysis. "
        "Unknown drugs are blocked before reaching the LLM — prevents hallucination."
    )
    icon = "search"
    name = "MedAgentRAGReader"

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(
            name="medications",
            display_name="Medications (name:dose_mg:frequency — one per line)",
            value="warfarin:5:daily\naspirin:100:daily",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="patient_age",
            display_name="Patient Age",
            value="72",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="patient_conditions",
            display_name="Patient Conditions",
            value="atrial fibrillation, hypertension",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="clinical_question",
            display_name="Clinical Question",
            value="Is it safe to continue both medications?",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="openai_key",
            display_name="OpenAI API Key (sk-...)",
            value="",
        ),
        # ── NEW: KB folder path input ─────────────────────────────────
        # Users can override the default path directly in the LangFlow UI
        MessageTextInput(
            name="kb_dir",
            display_name="KB Folder Path (KBFILES directory)",
            value=KB_DIR_DEFAULT,
            info=(
                "Path to the folder containing your .txt clinical KB documents. "
                "Default: C:\\Users\\Yukth\\Downloads\\KBFILES. "
                "All .txt files in this folder are loaded, chunked and embedded. "
                "You can also set the KB_DIR environment variable to override."
            ),
        ),
    ]

    outputs = [
        Output(
            display_name="RAG Analysis Output",
            name="rag_output",
            method="build_output",
        ),
    ]

    # ── MCP Tool: RxNorm drug validation ─────────────────────────────
    def _rxnorm_validate(self, drug_name: str) -> dict:
        """
        MCP Tool: calls RxNorm API (free, no key needed) to check
        whether a drug name is a real, recognised medication.
        """
        try:
            r = httpx.get(
                "https://rxnav.nlm.nih.gov/REST/rxcui.json",
                params={"name": drug_name, "search": 2},
                timeout=5.0,
            )
            if r.status_code == 200:
                data  = r.json()
                rxcui = data.get("idGroup", {}).get("rxnormId", [])
                if rxcui:
                    name_r = httpx.get(
                        f"https://rxnav.nlm.nih.gov/REST/rxcui/{rxcui[0]}/property.json",
                        params={"propName": "RxNorm Name"},
                        timeout=5.0,
                    )
                    label = drug_name
                    if name_r.status_code == 200:
                        props     = name_r.json().get("propConceptGroup", {})
                        prop_list = props.get("propConcept", [])
                        if prop_list:
                            label = prop_list[0].get("propValue", drug_name)
                    return {
                        "drug":   drug_name,
                        "found":  True,
                        "rxcui":  rxcui[0],
                        "label":  label,
                        "status": f"✅ Validated — RxCUI: {rxcui[0]} ({label})",
                    }
                return {
                    "drug":   drug_name,
                    "found":  False,
                    "rxcui":  None,
                    "label":  None,
                    "status": f"❌ NOT FOUND in RxNorm — possible fictional/misspelled drug",
                }
        except Exception as e:
            return {
                "drug":   drug_name,
                "found":  True,   # fail-open so RxNorm outage doesn't block all queries
                "rxcui":  None,
                "label":  drug_name,
                "status": f"⚠️ RxNorm unreachable ({e}) — proceeding without validation",
            }

    # ── ChromaDB KB — reads from KBFILES folder ───────────────────────
    def _get_kb(self, api_key: str) -> Chroma:
        """
        Loads all .txt files from the KB folder, splits them into
        500-token chunks with 50-token overlap, embeds with
        text-embedding-3-small, and stores in ChromaDB.

        Priority for folder path:
          1. kb_dir input field (set in LangFlow UI)
          2. KB_DIR environment variable
          3. KB_DIR_DEFAULT constant at top of file
        """
        # Resolve folder path
        kb_dir = (
            getattr(self, "kb_dir", "").strip()
            or os.getenv("KB_DIR", "")
            or KB_DIR_DEFAULT
        )

        # Normalise path separators (handles Windows backslashes)
        kb_dir = os.path.normpath(kb_dir)

        # Find all .txt files in the folder
        pattern   = os.path.join(kb_dir, "*.txt")
        txt_files = sorted(glob.glob(pattern))

        if not txt_files:
            raise FileNotFoundError(
                f"No .txt files found in KB folder: {kb_dir}\n"
                f"Expected path: {kb_dir}\n"
                f"Please check the 'KB Folder Path' field in the component settings.\n"
                f"Files found in folder: {os.listdir(kb_dir) if os.path.exists(kb_dir) else 'FOLDER DOES NOT EXIST'}"
            )

        # Load each .txt file as a Document
        raw_docs = []
        for fpath in txt_files:
            try:
                with open(fpath, encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    content = f.read()
                raw_docs.append(Document(
                    page_content=content,
                    metadata={
                        "source":   os.path.basename(fpath),
                        "filepath": fpath,
                    }
                ))
                print(f"   ✅ Loaded KB file: {os.path.basename(fpath)} ({len(content):,} chars)")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"   ⚠️  Could not load {fpath}: {e}")

        if not raw_docs:
            raise ValueError(
                f"Found .txt files in {kb_dir} but could not load any of them. "
                f"Check file encoding (must be UTF-8)."
            )

        print(f"   📚 Loaded {len(raw_docs)} KB documents from {kb_dir}")

        # Split into chunks
        chunks = RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter(
            chunk_size=500,
            chunk_overlap=50,
            separators=["\n\n", "\n", ". ", " ", ""],
        ).split_documents(raw_docs)

        print(f"   🔪 {len(chunks)} chunks created")

        # Embed with text-embedding-3-small (replaces HuggingFace MiniLM)
        embeddings = OpenAIEmbeddings(
            model="text-embedding-3-small",
            api_key=api_key,
        )

        db = Chroma.from_documents(
            chunks,
            embeddings,
            collection_name="medagent_kbfiles",
            persist_directory="./chroma_medagent_kbfiles",
        )

        print(f"   ✅ ChromaDB ready — {len(chunks)} chunks embedded")
        return db

    # ── Parse medication input ────────────────────────────────────────
    def _parse_meds(self):
        meds, parsed = {}, []
        for line in self.medications.strip().split("\n"):
            if not line.strip():
                continue
            parts = line.strip().split(":")
            name  = parts[0].strip().lower()
            dose  = parts[1].strip() if len(parts) > 1 else "unknown"
            freq  = parts[2].strip() if len(parts) > 2 else "daily"
            parsed.append({"name": name, "dose": dose, "freq": freq})
            meds[name] = {"dose": dose, "freq": freq}
        pairs = [
            (parsed[i]["name"], parsed[j]["name"])
            for i in range(len(parsed))
            for j in range(i + 1, len(parsed))
        ]
        return pairs, meds

    # ── Main build ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    def build_output(self) -> Message:
        key = self.openai_key or os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY", "")
        if not key:
            return Message(text=(
                "⛔ ERROR: OpenAI API key not set.\n"
                "Set it in the 'OpenAI API Key' field or via OPENAI_API_KEY env var."
            ))

        llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o", temperature=0.1, api_key=key, max_tokens=1200)

        pairs, meds = self._parse_meds()

        # ── STEP 1: RxNorm MCP validation ────────────────────────────
        validation_log = []
        blocked_drugs  = []

        for drug_name in list(meds.keys()):
            result = self._rxnorm_validate(drug_name)
            validation_log.append(result["status"])
            if not result["found"]:
                blocked_drugs.append(drug_name)

        if blocked_drugs:
            return Message(text=(
                f"⛔ BLOCKED BY RxNorm MCP TOOL\n\n"
                f"The following drug(s) were not found in RxNorm:\n"
                + "\n".join(f"  • {d}" for d in blocked_drugs)
                + f"\n\nRxNorm validation log:\n"
                + "\n".join(f"  {v}" for v in validation_log)
                + f"\n\nPlease check spelling or use the generic drug name.\n"
                f"MedAgent only assesses recognised medications.\n\n"
                f"⚠️ DISCLAIMER: AI-generated. Research only. Not medical advice."
            ))

        # ── STEP 2: Load KB from folder + ChromaDB search + LLM ──────
        try:
            kb = self._get_kb(key)
        except FileNotFoundError as e:
            return Message(text=f"⛔ KB FOLDER ERROR\n\n{e}")
        except Exception as e:
            return Message(text=f"⛔ KB LOADING ERROR\n\n{e}")

        results = []

        for drug_a, drug_b in pairs:
            docs    = kb.similarity_search(
                f"{drug_a} {drug_b} interaction severity mechanism", k=4
            )
            context = "\n---\n".join(
                f"[source={d.metadata.get('source', '?')}] {d.page_content}"
                for d in docs
            )
            ma, mb = meds.get(drug_a, {}), meds.get(drug_b, {})
            prompt = AGENT1_SYS.format(
                age=self.patient_age,
                conditions=self.patient_conditions,
                drug_a=drug_a, dose_a=ma.get("dose", "?"), freq_a=ma.get("freq", "daily"),
                drug_b=drug_b, dose_b=mb.get("dose", "?"), freq_b=mb.get("freq", "daily"),
                clinical_question=self.clinical_question,
                context=context,
            )
            chain  = (
                ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([HumanMessage(content=prompt)])
                | llm
                | StrOutputParser()
            )
            result = chain.invoke({})

            severity = "UNKNOWN"
            for lvl in ["MAJOR", "MODERATE", "MINOR"]:
                if lvl in result.upper():
                    severity = lvl
                    break

            results.append({
                "drug_a":            drug_a,
                "drug_b":            drug_b,
                "severity":          severity,
                "summary":           result,
                "rxnorm_validation": validation_log,
                "kb_source":         [d.metadata.get("source") for d in docs],
            })

        return Message(text=json.dumps(results, indent=2))

kb_dir.info: Path to the folder containing your .txt clinical KB documents. Default: C:\Users\Yukth\Downloads\KBFILES. All .txt files in this folder are loaded, chunked and embedded. You can also set the KB_DIR environment variable to override.
kb_dir.name: kb_dir

node.description: Calls OpenFDA Adverse Events and Label APIs using synchronous httpx. Cross-validates Agent 1 RAG results against live FDA data. Outputs final validated severity as JSON for Report Compiler.

code.name: code
code.value:
# ============================================================
# COMPONENT 2 — PASTE THIS into Custom Component in LangFlow
# Name: MedAgent — Agent 2 FDA Validator
# Fix: replaced async _fev/_flb with sync httpx calls
# ============================================================
from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import MessageInput, MessageTextInput, Output
from langflow.schema.message import Message
 
import os, json, httpx
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.output_parsers import StrOutputParser
 
 
AGENT2_SYS = """You are a drug safety specialist cross-checking a drug interaction report.
 
Patient: {age}y | Conditions: {conditions}
Drugs: {drug_a} ({dose_a}mg {freq_a}) + {drug_b} ({dose_b}mg {freq_b})
 
AGENT 1 KNOWLEDGE BASE FINDINGS (already verified from KB):
{rag_summary}
 
LIVE OPENFDA DATA (retrieved now — use these exact numbers):
  {drug_a}: {events_a} adverse event reports | Top reactions: {reactions_a}
  {drug_b}: {events_b} adverse event reports | Top reactions: {reactions_b}
  {drug_a} boxed warning: {boxed_a}
  {drug_a} label warnings: {warnings_a}
  Drug interaction text ({drug_a} label): {interactions_a}
 
Rules:
- Quote the exact FDA event numbers above — do not invent figures
- If FDA data confirms Agent 1 findings, state this explicitly
- If FDA data contradicts Agent 1 findings, explain the discrepancy
- Base FINAL VALIDATED SEVERITY on both KB and FDA data combined
 
Respond with:
1. VALIDATION: Does FDA data confirm or contradict KB findings?
2. FDA SIGNAL: Quote exact event count. Above 10000 is a strong signal.
3. DOSE-SPECIFIC RISK: Does patient dose affect risk?
4. PATIENT FACTORS: How do age and conditions modulate risk?
5. FINAL VALIDATED SEVERITY: [MAJOR / MODERATE / MINOR / UNKNOWN]
 
⚠️ DISCLAIMER: AI-generated. Research only. Not medical advice."""
 
 
 
class MedAgentFDAValidator(Component):
    display_name = "MedAgent — Agent 2 FDA Validator"
    description  = (
        "Calls OpenFDA Adverse Events and Label APIs using synchronous httpx. "
        "Cross-validates Agent 1 RAG results against live FDA data. "
        "Outputs final validated severity as JSON for Report Compiler."
    )
    icon = "shield"
    name = "MedAgentFDAValidator"
 
    inputs = [
        MessageInput(
            name="rag_output",
            display_name="Agent 1 RAG Output (connect from Agent 1)",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="medications",
            display_name="Medications (name:dose_mg:frequency — one per line)",
            value="warfarin:5:daily\naspirin:100:daily",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="patient_age",
            display_name="Patient Age",
            value="72",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="patient_conditions",
            display_name="Patient Conditions",
            value="atrial fibrillation, hypertension",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="openai_key",
            display_name="OpenAI API Key (sk-...)",
            value="",
        ),
    ]
 
    outputs = [
        Output(
            display_name="FDA Validation Output",
            name="fda_output",
            method="build_output",
        ),
    ]
 
    # ── FDA Tool 1: Adverse Events (sync) ─────────────────────────────
    def get_adverse_events(self, drug):
        url    = "https://api.fda.gov/drug/event.json"
        params = {
            "search": f"patient.drug.medicinalproduct:{drug}",
            "limit":  5,
            "count":  "patient.reaction.reactionmeddrapt.exact",
        }
        try:
            r = httpx.get(url, params=params, timeout=10.0)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                data = r.json()
                total = data.get("meta", {}).get("results", {}).get("total", 0)
                terms = [x["term"] for x in data.get("results", [])[:5]]
                return {"drug": drug, "total_events": total, "top_reactions": terms}
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"   FDA events error for {drug}: {e}")
        return {"drug": drug, "total_events": 0, "top_reactions": []}
 
    # ── FDA Tool 2: Drug Label (sync) ─────────────────────────────────
    def get_drug_label(self, drug):
        url    = "https://api.fda.gov/drug/label.json"
        params = {"search": f"openfda.generic_name:{drug}", "limit": 1}
        try:
            r = httpx.get(url, params=params, timeout=10.0)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                rec = r.json().get("results", [{}])[0]
                return {
                    "drug":             drug,
                    "boxed_warning":    (rec.get("boxed_warning")    or ["None"])[0][:300],
                    "warnings":         (rec.get("warnings")         or ["No data"])[0][:400],
                    "drug_interactions":(rec.get("drug_interactions") or ["No data"])[0][:400],
                }
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"   FDA label error for {drug}: {e}")
        return {
            "drug":              drug,
            "boxed_warning":     "None",
            "warnings":          "Not found",
            "drug_interactions": "Not found",
        }
 
    # ── Parse medications ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    def parse_meds(self):
        meds, parsed = {}, []
        for line in self.medications.strip().split("\n"):
            if not line.strip():
                continue
            parts = line.strip().split(":")
            name  = parts[0].strip().lower()
            dose  = parts[1].strip() if len(parts) > 1 else "unknown"
            freq  = parts[2].strip() if len(parts) > 2 else "daily"
            parsed.append({"name": name, "dose": dose, "freq": freq})
            meds[name] = {"dose": dose, "freq": freq}
        pairs = [
            (parsed[i]["name"], parsed[j]["name"])
            for i in range(len(parsed))
            for j in range(i + 1, len(parsed))
        ]
        return pairs, meds
 
    # ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    def build_output(self) -> Message:
 
        # Parse Agent 1 input
        rag_text = ""
        if self.rag_output:
            rag_text = (
                self.rag_output.text
                if hasattr(self.rag_output, "text")
                else str(self.rag_output)
            )
        try:
            rag_results = json.loads(rag_text)
            if not isinstance(rag_results, list):
                rag_results = [rag_results]
        except Exception:
            rag_results = [{
                "drug_a":   "unknown",
                "drug_b":   "unknown",
                "severity": "UNKNOWN",
                "summary":  rag_text,
            }]
 
        # Pass through skip or blocked signals unchanged
        if rag_results and rag_results[0].get("skip"):
            return Message(text=json.dumps(rag_results, indent=2))
        if rag_results and rag_results[0].get("blocked"):
            return Message(text=json.dumps(rag_results, indent=2))
 
        key = self.openai_key or os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY", "")
        llm = ChatOpenAI(
            model="gpt-4o",
            temperature=0.1,
            api_key=key,
            max_tokens=1200,
        )
 
        pairs, meds  = self.parse_meds()
        fda_results  = []
 
        for i, (drug_a, drug_b) in enumerate(pairs):
 
            rag_entry = rag_results[i] if i < len(rag_results) else rag_results[0]
            ma = meds.get(drug_a, {})
            mb = meds.get(drug_b, {})
 
            # Call FDA APIs synchronously
            print(f"   🔬 FDA lookup: {drug_a} + {drug_b}")
            ev_a = self.get_adverse_events(drug_a)
            ev_b = self.get_adverse_events(drug_b)
            lb_a = self.get_drug_label(drug_a)
            lb_b = self.get_drug_label(drug_b)
 
            prompt = AGENT2_SYS.format(
                age=self.patient_age,
                conditions=self.patient_conditions,
                drug_a=drug_a,
                dose_a=ma.get("dose", "?"),
                freq_a=ma.get("freq", "daily"),
                drug_b=drug_b,
                dose_b=mb.get("dose", "?"),
                freq_b=mb.get("freq", "daily"),
                rag_summary=rag_entry.get("summary", "")[:800],
                events_a=ev_a.get("total_events", 0),
                reactions_a=", ".join(ev_a.get("top_reactions", ["none"])),
                events_b=ev_b.get("total_events", 0),
                reactions_b=", ".join(ev_b.get("top_reactions", ["none"])),
                boxed_a=lb_a.get("boxed_warning", "None")[:250],
                warnings_a=lb_a.get("warnings", "None")[:300],
                interactions_a=lb_a.get("drug_interactions", "None")[:300],
            )
 
            chain     = (
                ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([HumanMessage(content=prompt)])
                | llm
                | StrOutputParser()
            )
            validated = chain.invoke({})
 
            # Update severity from FDA validation
            severity = rag_entry.get("severity", "UNKNOWN")
            for lvl in ["MAJOR", "MODERATE", "MINOR"]:
                if lvl in validated.upper():
                    severity = lvl
                    break
 
            fda_results.append({
                "drug_a":          drug_a,
                "drug_b":          drug_b,
                "fda_events_a":    ev_a.get("total_events", 0),
                "fda_events_b":    ev_b.get("total_events", 0),
                "top_reactions_a": ev_a.get("top_reactions", []),
                "top_reactions_b": ev_b.get("top_reactions", []),
                "label_warning_a": lb_a.get("warnings", "")[:300],
                "validation":      validated,
                "final_severity":  severity,
                "rag_summary":     rag_entry.get("summary", ""),
            })
 
            print(f"   ✅ {drug_a} + {drug_b} → {severity}")
 
        return Message(text=json.dumps(fda_results, indent=2))

code.value:
# ============================================================
# COMPONENT 3 — PASTE THIS into Custom Component in LangFlow
# Name: MedAgent — Report Compiler
# Fix: returns clean plain text Message for Chat Output
# ============================================================
from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import MessageInput, MessageTextInput, Output
from langflow.schema.message import Message
 
import os, json
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.output_parsers import StrOutputParser
 
 
COMPILER_SYS = """You are a senior clinical pharmacist writing a formal interaction report.
 
Patient: {age}y | Conditions: {conditions}
Clinical question: {clinical_question}
 
Drug pair: {drug_a} ({dose_a}mg {freq_a}) + {drug_b} ({dose_b}mg {freq_b})
Knowledge Base (Agent 1): {rag_summary}
FDA Validation (Agent 2): {fda_validation}
FDA adverse events: {drug_a}={events_a} | {drug_b}={events_b}
Top reactions: {top_reactions}
 
Write exactly these sections:
 
SEVERITY: [MAJOR/MODERATE/MINOR/UNKNOWN]
 
SUMMARY:
[2-3 sentences — what is the interaction and why it matters for THIS patient]
 
MECHANISM:
[2 sentences — pharmacological mechanism]
 
DOSE CONSIDERATION:
[1 sentence — does the patient specific dose affect risk?]
 
CLINICAL ACTION:
- [bullet point 1]
- [bullet point 2]
- [bullet point 3]
 
PATIENT ADVICE:
[2-3 plain-language sentences for the patient]
 
SOURCES: Knowledge base + OpenFDA (open.fda.gov)"""
 
OVERALL_SYS = """Summarise a multi-drug interaction assessment.
 
Patient: {age}y | {conditions} | Question: {clinical_question}
Medications: {meds}
 
Individual findings:
{summaries}
 
Write:
OVERALL SUMMARY:
[3-4 sentences, most clinically important finding first]
 
PRIORITISED RECOMMENDATIONS:
1. [most urgent]
2. [second]
3. [third]"""
 
 
class MedAgentReportCompiler(Component):
    display_name = "MedAgent — Report Compiler"
    description  = (
        "Takes Agent 2 FDA output and produces a clean readable "
        "clinical drug interaction report. Output goes directly to "
        "Chat Output — plain text, no JSON."
    )
    icon = "file-text"
    name = "MedAgentReportCompiler"
 
    inputs = [
        MessageInput(
            name="fda_output",
            display_name="Agent 2 FDA Output (connect from Agent 2)",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="medications",
            display_name="Medications (name:dose_mg:frequency — one per line)",
            value="warfarin:5:daily\naspirin:100:daily",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="patient_age",
            display_name="Patient Age",
            value="72",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="patient_conditions",
            display_name="Patient Conditions",
            value="atrial fibrillation, hypertension",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="clinical_question",
            display_name="Clinical Question",
            value="Is it safe to continue both medications?",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="openai_key",
            display_name="OpenAI API Key (sk-...)",
            value="",
        ),
    ]
 
    outputs = [
        Output(
            display_name="Clinical Report",
            name="report_output",
            method="build_output",
        ),
    ]
 
    def _get_llm(self):
        key = self.openai_key or os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY", "")
        return ChatOpenAI(
            model="gpt-4o",
            temperature=0.1,
            api_key=key,
            max_tokens=1500,
        )
 
    def _parse_meds(self):
        meds, parsed = {}, []
        for line in self.medications.strip().split("\n"):
            if not line.strip():
                continue
            parts = line.strip().split(":")
            name  = parts[0].strip().lower()
            dose  = parts[1].strip() if len(parts) > 1 else "unknown"
            freq  = parts[2].strip() if len(parts) > 2 else "daily"
            parsed.append({"name": name, "dose": dose, "freq": freq})
            meds[name] = {"dose": dose, "freq": freq}
        pairs = [
            (parsed[i]["name"], parsed[j]["name"])
            for i in range(len(parsed))
            for j in range(i + 1, len(parsed))
        ]
        return pairs, meds
 
    def build_output(self) -> Message:
 
        # ── Parse Agent 2 input ───────────────────────────────────────
        fda_text = ""
        if self.fda_output:
            fda_text = (
                self.fda_output.text
                if hasattr(self.fda_output, "text")
                else str(self.fda_output)
            )
 
        try:
            fda_results = json.loads(fda_text)
            if not isinstance(fda_results, list):
                fda_results = [fda_results]
        except Exception:
            # fda_output is already plain text — wrap it
            fda_results = [{
                "drug_a":          "drug A",
                "drug_b":          "drug B",
                "final_severity":  "UNKNOWN",
                "validation":      fda_text,
                "rag_summary":     "",
                "fda_events_a":    0,
                "fda_events_b":    0,
                "top_reactions_a": [],
                "top_reactions_b": [],
            }]
 
        llm         = self._get_llm()
        pairs, meds = self._parse_meds()
        sev_rank    = {"MAJOR": 3, "MODERATE": 2, "MINOR": 1, "UNKNOWN": 0}
        reports     = []
 
        for fda in fda_results:
 
            # Skip signal from supervisor pattern
            if fda.get("skip"):
                continue
 
            # Blocked by RxNorm
            if fda.get("blocked"):
                reports.append({
                    "pair":     f"{fda.get('drug_a','')} + {fda.get('drug_b','')}",
                    "severity": "BLOCKED",
                    "report":   fda.get("summary", fda.get("message", "Drug blocked by RxNorm validation.")),
                })
                continue
 
            drug_a = fda.get("drug_a", "")
            drug_b = fda.get("drug_b", "")
            ma     = meds.get(drug_a, {})
            mb     = meds.get(drug_b, {})
            top_rx = list(set(
                fda.get("top_reactions_a", []) +
                fda.get("top_reactions_b", [])
            ))[:5]
 
            prompt = COMPILER_SYS.format(
                age=self.patient_age,
                conditions=self.patient_conditions,
                clinical_question=self.clinical_question,
                drug_a=drug_a,
                dose_a=ma.get("dose", "?"),
                freq_a=ma.get("freq", "daily"),
                drug_b=drug_b,
                dose_b=mb.get("dose", "?"),
                freq_b=mb.get("freq", "daily"),
                rag_summary=fda.get("rag_summary", "")[:800],
                fda_validation=fda.get("validation", "")[:800],
                events_a=fda.get("fda_events_a", 0),
                events_b=fda.get("fda_events_b", 0),
                top_reactions=", ".join(top_rx) or "none recorded",
            )
 
            chain  = (
                ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([HumanMessage(content=prompt)])
                | llm
                | StrOutputParser()
            )
            report = chain.invoke({})
 
            reports.append({
                "pair":     f"{drug_a} + {drug_b}",
                "severity": fda.get("final_severity", "UNKNOWN"),
                "report":   report,
            })
 
        if not reports:
            return Message(text=(
                "No drug pairs were processed.\n"
                "Please check that Agent 1 and Agent 2 are connected correctly.\n\n"
                "⚠️ DISCLAIMER: AI-generated. Research only. Not medical advice."
            ))
 
        # ── Overall summary ───────────────────────────────────────────
        highest   = max(reports, key=lambda r: sev_rank.get(r["severity"], 0))
        summaries = "\n\n".join(
            f"[{r['pair']} — {r['severity']}]\n{r['report'][:400]}"
            for r in reports
        )
 
        overall_prompt = OVERALL_SYS.format(
            age=self.patient_age,
            conditions=self.patient_conditions,
            clinical_question=self.clinical_question,
            meds=self.medications.replace("\n", ", "),
            summaries=summaries,
        )
        chain   = (
            ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([HumanMessage(content=overall_prompt)])
            | llm
            | StrOutputParser()
        )
        overall = chain.invoke({})
 
        # ── Build final plain text output ─────────────────────────────
        # This is what Chat Output displays
        divider = "\n" + "=" * 55 + "\n"
 
        sections = []
        sections.append(
            f"🏥 MEDAGENT AI — DRUG INTERACTION REPORT\n"
            f"Patient: {self.patient_age}y | {self.patient_conditions}\n"
            f"Highest severity: {highest['severity']}"
        )
 
        for r in reports:
            sev_icon = (
                "🔴" if r["severity"] == "MAJOR"
                else "🟠" if r["severity"] == "MODERATE"
                else "🟡" if r["severity"] == "MINOR"
                else "⛔" if r["severity"] == "BLOCKED"
                else "⚪"
            )
            sections.append(
                f"{sev_icon} {r['pair'].upper()}\n\n{r['report']}"
            )
 
        sections.append(overall)
        sections.append(
            "⚠️ DISCLAIMER: AI-generated content for research "
            "purposes only. Does NOT constitute medical advice. "
            "Consult a qualified pharmacist or physician before "
            "any clinical decision."
        )
 
        final_text = divider.join(sections)
 
        return Message(text=final_text)

code.value:
from collections.abc import Generator
from typing import Any

import orjson
from fastapi.encoders import jsonable_encoder

from lfx.base.io.chat import ChatComponent
from lfx.helpers.data import safe_convert
from lfx.inputs.inputs import BoolInput, DropdownInput, HandleInput, MessageTextInput
from lfx.schema.data import Data
from lfx.schema.dataframe import DataFrame
from lfx.schema.message import Message
from lfx.schema.properties import Source
from lfx.template.field.base import Output
from lfx.utils.constants import (
    MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_AI,
    MESSAGE_SENDER_USER,
)


class ChatOutput(ChatComponent):
    display_name = "Chat Output"
    description = "Display a chat message in the Playground."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/chat-input-and-output"
    icon = "MessagesSquare"
    name = "ChatOutput"
    minimized = True

    inputs = [
        HandleInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Inputs",
            info="Message to be passed as output.",
            input_types=["Data", "DataFrame", "Message"],
            required=True,
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="should_store_message",
            display_name="Store Messages",
            info="Store the message in the history.",
            value=True,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        DropdownInput(
            name="sender",
            display_name="Sender Type",
            options=[MESSAGE_SENDER_AI, MESSAGE_SENDER_USER],
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_AI,
            advanced=True,
            info="Type of sender.",
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="sender_name",
            display_name="Sender Name",
            info="Name of the sender.",
            value=MESSAGE_SENDER_NAME_AI,
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="session_id",
            display_name="Session ID",
            info="The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="context_id",
            display_name="Context ID",
            info="The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.",
            value="",
            advanced=True,
        ),
        MessageTextInput(
            name="data_template",
            display_name="Data Template",
            value="{text}",
            advanced=True,
            info="Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.",
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="clean_data",
            display_name="Basic Clean Data",
            value=True,
            advanced=True,
            info="Whether to clean data before converting to string.",
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(
            display_name="Output Message",
            name="message",
            method="message_response",
        ),
    ]

    def _build_source(self, id_: str | None, display_name: str | None, source: str | None) -> Source:
        source_dict = {}
        if id_:
            source_dict["id"] = id_
        if display_name:
            source_dict["display_name"] = display_name
        if source:
            # Handle case where source is a ChatOpenAI object
            if hasattr(source, "model_name"):
                source_dict["source"] = source.model_name
            elif hasattr(source, "model"):
                source_dict["source"] = str(source.model)
            else:
                source_dict["source"] = str(source)
        return Source(**source_dict)

    async def message_response(self) -> Message:
        # First convert the input to string if needed
        text = self.convert_to_string()

        # Get source properties
        source, _, display_name, source_id = self.get_properties_from_source_component()

        # Create or use existing Message object
        if isinstance(self.input_value, Message) and not self.is_connected_to_chat_input():
            message = self.input_value
            # Update message properties
            message.text = text
            # Preserve existing session_id from the incoming message if it exists
            existing_session_id = message.session_id
        else:
            message = Message(text=text)
            existing_session_id = None

        # Set message properties
        message.sender = self.sender
        message.sender_name = self.sender_name
        # Preserve session_id from incoming message, or use component/graph session_id
        message.session_id = (
            self.session_id or existing_session_id or (self.graph.session_id if hasattr(self, "graph") else None) or ""
        )
        message.context_id = self.context_id
        message.flow_id = self.graph.flow_id if hasattr(self, "graph") else None
        message.properties.source = self._build_source(source_id, display_name, source)

        # Store message if needed
        if message.session_id and self.should_store_message:
            stored_message = await self.send_message(message)
            self.message.value = stored_message
            message = stored_message

        self.status = message
        return message

    def _serialize_data(self, data: Data) -> str:
        """Serialize Data object to JSON string."""
        # Convert data.data to JSON-serializable format
        serializable_data = jsonable_encoder(data.data)
        # Serialize with orjson, enabling pretty printing with indentation
        json_bytes = orjson.dumps(serializable_data, option=orjson.OPT_INDENT_2)
        # Convert bytes to string and wrap in Markdown code blocks
        return "```json\n" + json_bytes.decode("utf-8") + "\n```"

    def _validate_input(self) -> None:
        """Validate the input data and raise ValueError if invalid."""
        if self.input_value is None:
            msg = "Input data cannot be None"
            raise ValueError(msg)
        if isinstance(self.input_value, list) and not all(
            isinstance(item, Message | Data | DataFrame | str) for item in self.input_value
        ):
            invalid_types = [
                type(item).__name__
                for item in self.input_value
                if not isinstance(item, Message | Data | DataFrame | str)
            ]
            msg = f"Expected Data or DataFrame or Message or str, got {invalid_types}"
            raise TypeError(msg)
        if not isinstance(
            self.input_value,
            Message | Data | DataFrame | str | list | Generator | type(None),
        ):
            type_name = type(self.input_value).__name__
            msg = f"Expected Data or DataFrame or Message or str, Generator or None, got {type_name}"
            raise TypeError(msg)

    def convert_to_string(self) -> str | Generator[Any, None, None]:
        """Convert input data to string with proper error handling."""
        self._validate_input()
        if isinstance(self.input_value, list):
            clean_data: bool = getattr(self, "clean_data", False)
            return "\n".join([safe_convert(item, clean_data=clean_data) for item in self.input_value])
        if isinstance(self.input_value, Generator):
            return self.input_value
        return safe_convert(self.input_value)

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.
data_template.name: data_template

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message
